services_section.label: THE WORK
services_section.heading: Every Wire, Panel, and Outlet

services.title: Electric Vehicle Charger Installation
services.description: Ford chargers and all EV models. Professional setup with safety inspections and code compliance. Get your car charging at home.

services.title: Circuit Breaker Repair & Replacement
services.description: Tripping breakers, dead circuits, panel upgrades. We diagnose the problem fast and fix it right the first time.

services.title: Emergency Electrical Service
services.description: Power outages, sparking outlets, electrical emergencies. Same day response when you need us most.

services.title: Residential Wiring & Outlets
services.description: New outlets, rewiring, electrical upgrades for homes. Clean work that passes inspection every time.

about.heading: Serving Chattanooga Since Day One
about.body: We're the Allied Electrical team that Chattanooga businesses and homeowners call when they need it done right. Our electricians like Peyton and Charles have built our reputation one job at a time — from Mini Mall Storage to residential Ford charger installations across the Tennessee Valley.

reviews.name: Mark W.
reviews.text: Allied handled my Ford charger installation perfectly — fast, professional, and safe setup from start to finish.

reviews.name: B. W.
reviews.text: Curt has always been prompt and fair helping us at Mini Mall Storage. Thank you for all your support!

reviews.name: Ben D.
reviews.text: Charles helped with my circuit breaker problem same day. Couldn't be happier — so glad I went with Allied over the bigger company.

reviews.name: Susan W.
reviews.text: Excellent service! Fast, efficient and reasonable. I'll use them anytime I need electrical work completed.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Tennessee Valley Electrical
service_areas.subheading: Serving homes and businesses across the greater Chattanooga area

cta.heading: Ready for Same Day Service?
cta.body: Don't wait for other companies. We answer our phones and show up when we say we will. Get your electrical work done right.
